requirement_topic.en: EAEU Low-Voltage Equipment Safety for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器的EAEU低压设备安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器的EAEU低壓設備安全要求

summary.en: Kazakhstan is an EAEU member state, so solar PV inverters placed on the Kazakhstan market may need EAEU conformity assessment under TR CU 004/2011 on low-voltage equipment when the product falls within the voltage and product scope. The exporter or local applicant should confirm whether the inverter is handled through declaration or certification, keep test reports and technical files, and apply EAC marking only after all applicable EAEU technical regulations are satisfied.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦是EAEU成员国，因此投放哈萨克斯坦市场的太阳能光伏逆变器在落入电压和产品范围时，可能需要按TR CU 004/2011低压设备安全技术法规进行EAEU符合性评价。出口商或当地申请人应确认逆变器适用声明还是认证路径，保存测试报告和技术文件，并仅在满足所有适用EAEU技术法规后使用EAC标志。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦是EAEU成員國，因此投放哈薩克斯坦市場的太陽能光伏逆變器在落入電壓和產品範圍時，可能需要按TR CU 004/2011低壓設備安全技術法規進行EAEU符合性評價。出口商或當地申請人應確認逆變器適用聲明還是認證路徑，保存測試報告和技術文件，並僅在滿足所有適用EAEU技術法規後使用EAC標誌。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On safety of low-voltage equipment
EAEU EAC marking and conformity assessment rules for products in technical-regulation scope

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2019 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, manufacturer safety testing, and IEC 62109 reports for export projects. GB/T 37408 evidence is useful for due diligence but does not replace EAEU TR CU 004/2011 conformity assessment or EAC technical-file obligations in Kazakhstan.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB/T 37408-2019作为光伏并网逆变器技术要求，并结合制造商安全测试及出口项目中的IEC 62109报告。GB/T 37408证据可用于技术尽调，但不能替代哈萨克斯坦所需的EAEU TR CU 004/2011符合性评价或EAC技术文件义务。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB/T 37408-2019作為光伏並網逆變器技術要求，並結合製造商安全測試及出口項目中的IEC 62109報告。GB/T 37408證據可用於技術盡調，但不能替代哈薩克斯坦所需的EAEU TR CU 004/2011符合性評價或EAC技術文件義務。

gap.en: A Chinese GB/T or IEC safety report does not by itself authorize sale in Kazakhstan. The gap is EAEU procedure, applicant responsibility, EAC marking, and Russian/Kazakh-language technical documentation for the declared or certified inverter model.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T或IEC安全报告本身并不授权在哈萨克斯坦销售。差距在于EAEU程序、申请人责任、EAC标志，以及已声明或已认证逆变器型号的俄文/哈文技术文件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T或IEC安全報告本身並不授權在哈薩克斯坦銷售。差距在於EAEU程序、申請人責任、EAC標誌，以及已聲明或已認證逆變器型號的俄文/哈文技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter is within TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage equipment scope
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-specific for GB/T 37408-2019; IEC 62109 evidence is commonly used for export but is not a domestic CCC substitute for PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat TR CU 004/2011 scope and EAC documentation as a Kazakhstan market-access gate; do not rely on GB/T 37408 or IEC 62109 reports alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将TR CU 004/2011适用范围和EAC文件视为哈萨克斯坦市场准入门槛；不要仅依赖GB/T 37408或IEC 62109报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將TR CU 004/2011適用範圍和EAC文件視為哈薩克斯坦市場准入門檻；不要僅依賴GB/T 37408或IEC 62109報告。
